user_claim: Customer: Hi, I am not sure if I am filing this in the right place, so please bear with me for a minute. | Support: No problem, tell me what happened. | Customer: The weather was bad last night and I had parked outside because the covered parking was full. Thus, the required view of the rear bumper is not provided.
claim_status_justification: img_1 shows a dent near the rear wheel but does not clearly show the rear bumper; img_2 is unrelated. There is not enough information to confirm a dent on the rear bumper.
